title: Seldom/Rarely/Never + 助動詞 + S + V（否定副詞倒裝）

formulas.zh: 否定副詞置句首引發倒裝，助動詞提前，強調否定意義

formulas.formula: No sooner + had + S + V + than...
formulas.zh: 剛一...就...，表示兩個動作快速連續發生

explanation: 此句型將否定副詞（seldom, rarely, never, hardly, scarcely, little等）置於句首，引發助動詞倒裝提前，強調否定或稀少的意義。結構為：否定詞+助動詞（do/does/did/have/has/had）+主詞+動詞原型。用於強調某事幾乎不發生或從未發生。注意與簡單否定句的區別：此句型強調程度與語氣，倒裝形式使表達更有力度。No sooner...than為特殊用法，表「剛一...就...」。

examples.eng: Seldom does she go to the party without bringing a gift.
examples.chi: 她很少去參加派對而不帶禮物。

examples.eng: Never have I seen such a beautiful sunset in my life.
examples.chi: 我這輩子從未見過如此美麗的日落。

examples.eng: Hardly had he finished his homework when his mother called him.
examples.chi: 他剛做完功課，他媽媽就叫他。

examples.eng: No sooner had the meeting started than an urgent email arrived.
examples.chi: 會議才剛開始，一封緊急郵件就到了。

extension.tip: 判斷何時使用倒裝：若副詞具強負面或稀少意義且置句首，必須倒裝。常見錯誤：忘記倒裝或倒裝形式錯誤。記住：否定副詞句首→必須倒裝助動詞。若句子無助動詞，用do/does/did幫助倒裝。

examples.test: ✗ Never she has seen this movie.
examples.result: → ✓ Never has she seen this movie.（助動詞has須提前）

examples.test: ✗ Hardly the train arrived when he got on.
examples.result: → ✓ Hardly had the train arrived when he got on.（需用had倒裝）
→ ✓ Seldom do they go there.（現在簡單式需用do倒裝）

extension.note: 否定詞句首即倒裝，助動詞必定提前於主詞之前，此為固定語法結構。

parts: he leave his hometown without visiting his parents.
exercises.sentence: Seldom does he leave his hometown without visiting his parents.
exercises.translation: 他很少離開家鄉而不去看望父母。

parts: I imagined that she would become a famous scientist.
exercises.sentence: Never had I imagined that she would become a famous scientist.
exercises.translation: 我從未想過她會成為著名的科學家。

parts: I entered the classroom than the teacher announced a quiz.
exercises.sentence: No sooner had I entered the classroom than the teacher announced a quiz.
exercises.translation: 我才進教室，老師就宣布了小考。

parts: the rain stopped when the children ran outside to play.
exercises.sentence: Hardly had the rain stopped when the children ran outside to play.
exercises.translation: 雨才剛停，孩子們就跑出去玩了。

vocab_table.zh: 助動詞，用於完成式倒裝

mc_exercises.question_chi: 填入最適當的選項，完成這句關於她很少參加派對的句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: Seldom _______ she attend parties without bringing a gift.
mc_exercises.explanation: 否定副詞Seldom置於句首時，須引發助動詞倒裝。正確形式為：Seldom + does + she + attend。選項B重複主詞造成句子錯誤；C使用be動詞不符合此句結構；D用未來式不當，應用一般現在式表習慣性動作。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的倒裝形式，表示他從未見過如此美麗的景象
mc_exercises.question_eng: Never _______ such a magnificent view in my entire life.
mc_exercises.explanation: Never置於句首引發完全倒裝，助動詞have提前於主詞I前。正確形式：Never have I seen...。選項A缺乏倒裝；C過去簡單式不符合現在完成的意義；D用did表示過去，但此句應強調從未經歷過的經驗，需用現在完成式。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確形式，表示很少有人知道這個秘密已經被揭露
mc_exercises.explanation: Rarely置於句首引發倒裝：Rarely + has + the secret + been revealed。被動語態需用現在完成式表示至今未發生。選項A缺助動詞has；B多餘重複the secret；D主詞動詞不符（have應配複數主詞）。此題強調助動詞倒裝與被動語態結合。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適切的選項，表示他剛踏入辦公室就立即被指派任務
mc_exercises.question_eng: No sooner _______ the office _______ he was assigned a task.
mc_exercises.explanation: No sooner...than結構中，No sooner後須用過去完成式had + pp，than後用過去簡單式。正確形式：No sooner had he entered the office than he was assigned a task。選項A用did不符時態要求；C/D用when不符此固定搭配，No sooner必須搭配than而非when。

translation_exercises.answer: Seldom do I arrive at school late.
key_points: 助動詞 do 倒裝提前
主詞 I 後接動詞原型 arrive
hints: 句型框架：Seldom + do/does + S + V 原型
注意：不能寫成 'Seldom I arrive'（缺少倒裝助動詞）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他幾乎從未缺席過班級會議。
translation_exercises.answer: Hardly has he ever missed a class meeting.
key_points: 助動詞 has 倒裝提前
過去分詞 missed 搭配完成式
hints: 句型框架：Hardly + has/have + S + 過去分詞
注意：與簡單過去式 'did miss' 區別，此處用完成式強調'從未發生過'

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 她很少不完成功課就上床睡覺。
translation_exercises.answer: Rarely does she go to bed without finishing her homework.
key_points: Rarely 否定副詞倒裝句首
hints: 句型框架：Rarely + does + S + V 原型 + 補語
注意：without + 動名詞是常見搭配，不影響倒裝結構

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我們才剛走出教室，大雨就傾盆而下。
translation_exercises.answer: No sooner had we left the classroom than it poured with rain.
key_points: No sooner...than 特殊倒裝句型
第一個分句用過去完成式 had + 過去分詞
第二個分句用簡單過去式表先後順序
hints: 句型框架：No sooner + had + S + 過去分詞 + than + S + 簡單過去式
注意：'剛一...就...' 的時序關係，前分句必須用 had（過去完成式），後分句用 did（簡單過去式）
